title: restart.md: deprecated command `podman generate systemd` is used
body:
### Issue Description

The command `podman generate systemd` is deprecated since this PR:

* https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19414

Let's rewrite _docs/source/markdown/options/restart.md_ to refer to container units instead of `podman generate systemd`

Relevant markdown code:

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/7d6722bd696c0f73b160462d3e61ad3bbed6eb33/docs/source/markdown/options/restart.md?plain=1#L20
